title: How the morning shapes everything after it
caption:
Most men lose the day before 9 AM — not because they're lazy, but because they give the first hour to everyone else.

The phone. The notifications. The news. The moment you pick it up, the day belongs to whoever left a message. And the rest of the day is spent playing catch-up with your own soul.

Four habits that take the morning back: start without the phone, feed your faith before your feed, move before you make an excuse, name what faithfulness looks like today.

None of them require a perfect schedule. They require a decision.

Save this for the week your mornings have been chaos.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #morningroutine #christianity #thework
